name: Shaurya
description: The official sports committee of the campus. Organizing tournaments, matches and athletic events all year round.

name: Nrityam
description: The dance committee that celebrates movement and expression through classical, folk and western dance forms.

name: Sanskriti
description: The cultural club that brings together music, drama, art and everything that makes campus life vibrant.

name: Technocracy
description: The technical committee driving innovation through hackathons, workshops and industry connections.

name: TCP
description: The coding club where developers collaborate, build projects and sharpen their programming skills together.
